# Copilot Instructions — OlympiaTreasury.org

- Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, TypeScript 5 strict
- Tailwind CSS 4 with CSS-first `@theme inline` config
- Lucide React icons, JetBrains Mono for addresses
- Dark-first (#0a0f10), green accent (#00ffae), amber secondary (#F59E0B)
- CSS transitions only — no animation libraries
- Treasury address: `0xCfE1e0ECbff745e6c800fF980178a8dDEf94bEe2`
- Run `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck` before suggesting changes
